zh.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Maxwell於1285年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock23歲，母親Helen Pollock de Pencaitland20歲。他和Christian Carlile至少有1個兒子。他去世於1346年10月17日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年61歲。

zh-hans.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Maxwell于1285年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock23岁，母亲Helen Pollock de Pencaitland20岁。他和Christian Carlile至少有1个儿子。他去世于1346年10月17日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Maxwell was born in 1285, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock, was 23 and his mother, Helen Pollock de Pencaitland, was 20. He had at least 1 son with Christian Carlile. He died on 17 October 1346, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Maxwell est né en 1285, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Helen Pollock de Pencaitland, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Christian Carlile. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1346, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Maxwell 1285 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock 23 und seine Mutter Helen Pollock de Pencaitland 20. Er hatte mit Christian Carlile mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1346 im Alter von 61 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Maxwell è nato il nel 1285 nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Helen Pollock de Pencaitland, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Christian Carlile. Morì il 17 ottobre 1346, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.Dumfriesshire, Scotland: スコットランドダムフリーシュアイア
ja.London, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオック
ja.lifeSummary: John Maxwellが1285年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavockは23歳，母Helen Pollock de Pencaitlandは20歳であった。彼はChristian Carlileとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1346年10月17日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Maxwell(이)가 1285년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen Pollock de Pencaitland(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Christian Carlile(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 10월 17일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Maxwell nasceu em 1285, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Helen Pollock de Pencaitland, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Christian Carlile. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1346, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Maxwell родился в 1285 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Helen Pollock de Pencaitland, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Christian Carlile. Он умер 17 октября 1346 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Maxwell nació en 1285, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Helen Pollock de Pencaitland, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Christian Carlile. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1346, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
